channel.title: AI QA News

Рік розробки власного VPN: стек, захисти та перші граблі після релізу
item.category: This document appears to be a collection of technical information related to VPN technologies, specifically focusing on WireGuard, Radius servers, and network extensions. It discusses various aspects like API integration, health checks, NE (Network Extension) implementation, and anti-abuse measures. The content seems to be part of a forum discussion about follow-net.com and its offerings.

Nobody Checked the Medical AI: The Clearance Doctors Assume Does Not Exist
item.category: The text discusses a critical gap in trust surrounding medical AI, specifically concerning its certification and validation. It argues that doctors assume a clearance process exists for AI tools used at the bedside, but this clearance doesn't actually exist or is misunderstood. The core issue isn’t technical limitations of the AI itself (as evidenced by general-purpose models outperforming specialized clinical AI), but rather the lack of transparency and demonstrable evidence of evaluation presented to clinicians. This creates a dangerous disconnect between perceived safety and actual validation, fueled by human psychology and the desire for reassurance.
